title: Senior Doctor - Lilavati Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Lilavati Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Lilavati Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lilavati Hospital:
Lilavati Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital!
